allow: PowerShell($start = Get-Date; python main.py --test; $end = Get-Date; $duration = $end - $start; Write-Host "`n`n========== TIMING RESULTS ==========`nTotal execution time: $\($duration.TotalSeconds\) seconds`n====================================")

PowerShell($start = Get-Date; python main.py --test; $end = Get-Date; $duration = $end - $start; Write-Host "`n`n========== TIMING RESULTS ==========`nTotal execution time: $\($duration.TotalSeconds\) seconds`nTotal minutes: $\($duration.TotalMinutes.ToString\('F2'\)\) minutes`n====================================")
